cxu_object.claim: Signal accuracy varies dramatically by type with onchain-flow at ninety-three percent at fifteen minutes and vwap at sixty-seven to seventy-three percent being the most reliable while basis at seven percent and bb-reversal at seven percent are actively harmful and should be blocked

supporting_contexts.text: Best performers: onchain-flow 93% at 15m, vwap 67-73% at 5-15m. Medium: technical 53%, momentum 53% (better for range than direction). Worst: basis 7%, bb-reversal 7% (useless for direction; block these).

8,000+ settled predictions analyzed across all signal types. Signal accuracy varies wildly by type and horizon. The blocklist should include basis and bb-reversal signal types as they are worse than random.

blockedSignalTypes.description: Comma-separated list of signal types to block (accuracy below 15%)

preferredSignalTypes.description: Comma-separated list of signal types with above-average accuracy

version.change_description: Initial signal quality assessment from 8,000+ settled predictions
